mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_patient WHERE deleted = 0
AND (patient_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR card_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id_card LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.patient_code, p.name, p.card_no, p.age, p.birthday, p.gender, p.phone, p.id_card, p.source, COALESCE( ( SELECT m.member_type FROM clinic_member m WHERE m.patient_id = p.id AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), p.member_level, '非会员' ) AS member_level, COALESCE( ( SELECT m.expire_date FROM clinic_member m WHERE m.patient_id = p.id AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), p.member_expire_date ) AS member_expire_date, p.nation, p.marriage, p.education, p.province_city, p.address, p.job, p.company, p.remark, p.operator, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_patient (patient_code, name, card_no, age, birthday, gender, phone, id_card, source, member_level, member_expire_date, nation, marriage, education, province_city, address, job, company, remark, operator, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{patientCode}, #{name}, #{cardNo}, #{age}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{source}, #{memberLevel}, #{memberExpireDate}, #{nation}, #{marriage}, #{education}, #{provinceCity}, #{address}, #{job}, #{company}, #{remark}, #{operator}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_patient
patient_code = #{patientCode}, name = #{name}, card_no = #{cardNo}, age = #{age}, birthday = #{birthday}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, source = #{source}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, member_expire_date = #{memberExpireDate}, nation = #{nation}, marriage = #{marriage}, education = #{education}, province_city = #{provinceCity}, address = #{address}, job = #{job}, company = #{company}, remark = #{remark}, operator = #{operator}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE clinic_patient SET member_level = #{levelCode}, member_expire_date = #{expireDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
